package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingRateLimiterPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_rate_limiter_per_request"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Resource pooling. Flag rate limiter construction inside request handlers instead of per identity or dependency."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
